OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, e.g. 'flashpoint'.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

MISP_REFERENCE_URL.description: The MISP instance reference URL (used to create external reference, optional)

MISP_SSL_VERIFY.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), check if the SSL certificate is valid when using `https`.

MISP_CLIENT_CERT.description: The client certificate of the MISP instance. It must be a path to the client certificate and readable

MISP_DATE_FILTER_FIELD.description: The attribute to be used in filter to query new MISP events.

MISP_DATETIME_ATTRIBUTE.description: The attribute to be used to get the date of the event.

MISP_CREATE_REPORTS.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), create reports for each imported MISP event.

MISP_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), create indicators from attributes.

MISP_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), create observables from attributes.

MISP_CREATE_OBJECT_OBSERVABLES.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), create text observables for MISP objects.

MISP_REPORT_DESCRIPTION_ATTRIBUTE_FILTER.description: Filter to be used to find the attribute with report description (example: 'type=comment,category=Internal reference').

MISP_CREATE_TAGS_AS_LABELS.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), create tags as labels.

MISP_GUESS_THREATS_FROM_TAGS.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), try to guess threats (threat actor, intrusion set, malware, etc.) from MISP tags when they are present in OpenCTI.

MISP_AUTHOR_FROM_TAGS.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), map creator:XX=YY (author of event will be YY instead of the author of the event).

MISP_MARKINGS_FROM_TAGS.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), map marking:XX=YY (in addition to TLP, add XX:YY as marking definition, where XX is marking type, YY is marking value).

MISP_KEEP_ORIGINAL_TAGS_AS_LABEL.description: Any tag that start with any of these comma-separated value are kept as-is.

MISP_ENFORCE_WARNING_LIST.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), enforce warning list in MISP queries.

MISP_REPORT_TYPE.description: If `create_reports` is `True`, specify the `report_class` (category), default is `MISP Event`.

MISP_IMPORT_FROM_DATE.description: A date formatted `YYYY-MM-DD`, only import events created after this date.

MISP_IMPORT_TAGS.description: A list of tags separated with `,`, only import events with these tags.

MISP_IMPORT_TAGS_NOT.description: A list of tags separated with `,`, to exclude from import.

MISP_IMPORT_CREATOR_ORGS.description: A list of org identifiers separated with `,`, only import events created by these orgs.

MISP_IMPORT_CREATOR_ORGS_NOT.description: A list of org identifiers separated with `,`, do not import events created by these orgs.

MISP_IMPORT_OWNER_ORGS.description: A list of org identifiers separated with `,`, only import events owned by these orgs.

MISP_IMPORT_OWNER_ORGS_NOT.description: A list of org identifiers separated with `,`, do not import events owned by these orgs.

MISP_IMPORT_OWNER_KEYWORD.description: Search only events based on a keyword.

MISP_IMPORT_DISTRIBUTION_LEVELS.description: A list of distribution levels separated with `,`, only import events with these distribution levels.

MISP_IMPORT_THREAT_LEVELS.description: A list of threat levels separated with `,`, only import events with these threat levels.

MISP_IMPORT_ONLY_PUBLISHED.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), import only MISP published events.

MISP_IMPORT_WITH_ATTACHMENTS.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), try to import a PDF file from the attachment attribute.

MISP_IMPORT_TO_IDS_NO_SCORE.description: A score (`Integer`) value for the indicator/observable if the attribute `to_ids` value is no.

MISP_IMPORT_UNSUPPORTED_OBSERVABLES_AS_T.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), import unsupported observable as x_opencti_text.
A boolean (`True` or `False`), import unsupported observable as x_opencti_text just with the value.

MISP_PROPAGATE_LABELS.description: A boolean (`True` or `False`), propagate labels to the observables.

MISP_IMPORT_KEYWORD.description: Search only events based on a keyword.

MISP_INTERVAL.description: The interval in minutes between each run of the connector.
